text: Sasur ji ke guzarne ke baad property ko lekar bade bhai se rishta bilkul toot gaya hai, aur ab Saas ne announce kiya ki unke maike wale yahan permanently rahenge. Office ke dual burden ke beech main unhe mana nahi kar sakti kyunki parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye bade-buzurgo ke faisle par sawal uthana bad-tameezi mani jati hai. Main bas mann maar kar unki seva mein lag gayi hoon taaki log ye na kahein ki working bahu ne aate hi kalesh shuru kar diya.

Inheritance dispute ki wajah se pehle hi ghar mitti mein mil gaya hai aur ab pati ke chacha-chachi permanently hamare sath shift ho rahe hain. Career mein suppressed ambition ka dard hai par main Saas ke samman ke liye unhe jane ko nahi bol sakti kyunki unhone mere liye bahut kurbani di hain. Main bas sabki khatir-daari mein pis rahi hoon taaki rishtedar ye na kahein ki hamari bahu sanskari nahi rahi.

Ghar mein property ko lekar sibling estrangement itni badh gayi hai ki mahool hamesha bhari rehta hai, aur ab in-laws ke aane se meri work-life balance bilkul khatam ho gayi. Mera dimaag fat raha hai par parivaar ki shanti ke liye main chup-chap Saas ki har kadwi baat sunti hoon kyunki hamare yahan बड़ों ke aage bolna sanskar ke khilaf hai. Main apni takleef kisi ko nahi bata rahi taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bazaar mein na uchle.

Dadi ke marne ke baad jaydad ka jhagda itna badha ki ab Saas ne sulah ke liye apne bhai ko permanently bulaya hai. Mujh par office deadlines aur ghar ke kamo ka pehle hi bojh hai par main unhe jane ko nahi bol sakti kyunki rishto ka lihaz rakhna meri primary duty hai. Main bas mann hi mann ghut rahi hoon par bahar se sabki seva kar rahi hoon taaki parivar ki unity aur 'log kya kahenge' wala darr bana rahe.

Joint family mein property dispute ke beech in-laws ka permanent aana mere career ke liye ek naya obstacle hai, par pati ki khushi ke liye main chup hoon. Main apni suppressed ambition ko daba kar unki seva karna hi apna naya farz maan chuki hoon kyunki main parivaar mein aur fracture nahi chahti. Saas-bahu dynamics ki wajah se main hamesha defensive rehti hoon par unke samman mein apni har khwahish kurban kar rahi hoon.
